note-pitch-enharmonic.text: note.pitch describes the exact note spelling

note-ottava-cross-barline.text: An ottava is encoded within its starting measure but is free to span multiple bars

note-ottava-cross-system.text: An ottava is encoded within its starting measure but is free to span multiple pages

note-accidental-natural-sharp.text: Note is encoded with sharp; cancellation isn't explicitly encoded

note-accidental-natural-flat.text: Note is encoded with flat; cancellation isn't explicitly encoded

note-accidental-sharp-sharp.text: Not implemented; will likely be a style preference

note-accidental-flat-flat.text: Not implemented; will likely be a style preference

note-accidental-courtesy-after-barline.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-courtesy-after-keysig.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-courtesy-other-octave.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-courtesy-other-voice.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-courtesy-other-staff.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-courtesy-after-tie.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-courtesy-after-endings.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-scope-measure.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-scope-octave.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-scope-all-octaves.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-scope-single-note.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-cancel-barline.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-cancel-keysig.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-persist-tied.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-accidental-grace-affect-main.text: note.accidentalDisplay encodes whether accidental is visible; intent of accidental may be encoded in the future

note-tie-end.text: The start note contains a 'ties' attribute pointing to the end note(s)

note-tie-across-repeat.text: note.ties is an array, hence supporting ties across multiple endings or jumps

note-tie-across-volta.text: note.ties is an array, hence supporting ties across multiple endings or jumps

note-tie-across-jump.text: note.ties is an array, hence supporting ties across multiple endings or jumps

note-tie-into-coda.text: note.ties is an array, hence supporting ties across multiple endings or jumps

event-accent-staccato.text: Not directly encodable; use event markings 'accent' and 'staccato' keys together

event-marcato-staccato.text: Not directly encodable; use event markings 'strongAccent' and 'staccato' keys together

event-marcato-tenuto.text: Not directly encodable; use event markings 'strongAccent' and 'tenuto' keys together

event-tenuto-accent.text: Not directly encodable; use event markings 'accent' and 'tenuto' keys together

stem-direction-auto.text: Absence of event.stemDirection means consuming applications should decide

rest-multi-measure-old-style.text: Can be encoded as explicit rests; style option planned

rest-voice-offset.text: Can be encoded explicitly per-rest, not yet as a general strategy/rule

clef-type-arbitrary.text: C, F and G clefs supported at any staff position; other clef glyphs are unsupported

clef-position-courtesy.text: Not explicitly encoded; consuming applications may decide to render courtesy clefs

keysig-change-mid-measure.text: Key changes are only supported at barlines; encode as two separate bars

keysig-change-courtesy.text: Not explicitly encoded; consuming applications may decide to render courtesy keysigs

keysig-change-courtesy-cancellation.text: Not explicitly encoded; consuming applications may decide to render courtesy clefs

timesig-change-mid-measure.text: Timesig changes are only supported at barlines; encode as two separate bars

timesig-change-courtesy.text: Not explicitly encoded; consuming applications may decide to render courtesy timesigs

barline-span-partial.text: staff group barline style with custom staff groups

struct-lines-5.text: All music is currently assumed to be on five lines

struct-repeat-forward-backward.text: Not explicitly encoded; use both repeatStart and repeatEnd
